short_definition: The shared event-classification and view-eligibility contract for NARS clients.
description: The NARS Client Projection Contract prevents agent-cli, agent-web-ui, Cloudflare projection surfaces, and future clients from independently inventing what a NARS event means to an operator. It classifies conversation, operations, diagnostics, and raw records and defines which views may show which classes.
boundaries: Not the runtime event stream itself.

authority.notes: The package owns shared projection semantics and attach-command registry metadata.

counterexamples: raw provider text promoted into conversation

confidence.basis: The shared classification contract already exists and is used by multiple clients.
